project_state_summary: NullForge has AI Gate v0.2.1 PATCH-2 active on main, Reference CI as scientific authority, a public collaboration-provenance policy and unresolved browser/WASM and visualization validation gates.
current_task_summary: Define sanitized public preimplementation contracts for browser-to-Rust/WASM parity and visualization semantics without claiming that either implementation or validation already exists.
must_not_change: AI Gate workflow, validator, configuration, schema, test runner or external ruleset state
Reference CI authority, DSP behavior, scientific baselines, evidence classes or existing verified scope
public information boundary, private workspace separation or unpublished source material
deployment configuration, Netlify behavior, browser implementation or canonical release state
rollback_plan: Close the pull request without merge if either contract weakens scientific authority, implies validation that has not occurred or exposes internal material. After merge, revert only the two contract documents and their changelog/state entries while preserving AI Gate, Reference CI and prior scientific history.
